title: Lunar Events
description: Lunar Events adds naturally occurring events that can occur during the night such as blood moons. . .
body:
Blood Moons have a chance to happen on the 7th night of your world...
During a Blood Moon,most hostile mobs such as zombies or skeletons will be buffed and mobs that originally spawn under certain conditions such as the phantoms will be able to spawn this night! You cannot sleep, so beware. Droplets of blood will rain from the sky and from time to time you will hear screams coming from the darkness. When below 8 HP, you will hear your heart thumping ... Festival nights are unique and special events that have a chance to take place on every 7th night of your world...
Pay attention to the sky during this night...Fireworks will go off and green sparkles will lighten up the dark night...You can even hear the sparkling from time to time... During this night,crop growth rate is three times as fast and glow squids + axolotls will be able to spawn on the surface of your world! Mining diamonds will give you twice the amount and surprisingly, evil creatures will not attack you! Iron golems and villagers become friends with monsters this night!
Nether Moons have a chance to happen and are different from the other events!
During this night,all nether mobs will replace the hostile over world mobs and raid your world. You cannot sleep this night, so be prepared! Do make sure you are not surrounded by darkness... Overall, an event will take place every 7th night on your world, this event will be random each time! /function lunarevents:config ﻿- toggle events on and off to your personal preferences
/trigger announcements - toggle whether announcements are shown in chat or title
/trigger currentevent - see the current event that is occurring
